text: When the villain finally realises who he has been hunting all along... it's his own brother
title: The Truth Revealed

text: Wo ladka jo har baar galat samay pe sahi jagah hota hai. Isliye usne time travel kar liya
title: Time Luck

text: The last person in the bunker wasn't who they thought. The real enemy had been inside all along
title: Inside Threat

text: Jab usne apni maa ko pehli baar haath pakadna seekha, toh duniya badal gayi
title: Mother's Day Miracle

text: The note on the table said 'Don't open the red door'. He opened every door except that one
title: The Red Door

text: Police aaye, criminal bhaag gaya. Police gaya, criminal aaya. Yeh case kabhi solve nahi hoga
title: The Impossible Case

text: She had one hour to break him out of the most secure prison in the world. She needed a favour from her ex
title: The Ex Factor

text: Dosti mein usne sab kuch khaamosh rakha. Phir bhi woh dost nahi tha. Yeh jaankar dil toot gaya
title: Fake Friend

text: The doctor said 24 hours. He had already lived 48. Now comes the hardest decision of his life
title: 24 Hours

text: Usne sabko dhokha diya. Lekin sabse bada dhoka usne apne aap ko diya
title: The Biggest Lie

text: The map was blank. That was the first clue. The second was that three people who found it never came back
title: The Blank Map

text: Jab daag aag ban gaya, toh usne chitaaon ko rakh diya. Ab sirf ek rakh jaata hai... khud ko
title: Fire Within

text: He promised to never lie again. Then he told her the truth about who he really was. She never called back
title: The Truth About Love

text: Beta: Papa, aap hero kyun nahi ban paa rahe? Papa: Beta, asli hero wo hota hai jo ghar ke liye ladta hai
title: Real Hero

text: The antidote was in his blood. But so was the poison. The cure would also be the cause of death
title: Poison Cure

text: Wo ladki har baar galat waqt pe hasne lagti thi. Lekin is baar waqt khud galat ho gaya
title: Wrong Time

text: The robot learned to feel pain. The first thing it felt was loneliness
title: Robot Heart

text: Jab pyaar itna zyada ho ki saans lena bhool jaao... tab koi dua maangta hai
title: Breathless Love

text: The password was her birthday. He had forgotten it three times. She never reminded him
title: Forgotten Password

text: Chamatkaar tab hota hai jab koi aam aadmi kuch kar deta hai jo koi nahi kar sakta
title: Unsung Hero

text: The mirror showed a different face. The same eyes but someone else entirely. That was the moment he believed in parallel universes
title: The Mirror World

text: Mohabbat mein sabse mushkil waqt wo hota hai jab tumhe chhodna ho par haath thame rakhna ho
title: Holding On

text: The gun was empty. The enemy was gone. Only then did he realise he had been protecting himself all along
title: Empty Gun

text: Wo raat uske liye sabse kathin thi. Phir bhi subah ko usne muskaan pehen li
title: Strongest Smile

text: She said yes. The word that changed everything. And the same word that ended it
title: Yes

text: Dosti mein noor thi. Lekin dhuksha aayi jab wo noor andheri nikal gayi
title: Light in Dark

text: The treasure was never gold. It was the journey that made them family. Now only one remained to claim it
title: The Last Treasure

text: Haar mana insaniyat hai. Jeetna wo hai jo gir kar bhi khada ho
title: Never Give Up

text: The ghost appeared every midnight. Not to scare them. But to warn them about the one who wouldn't leave
title: The Warning Ghost

text: Khwahish badi thi, sohna bada tha. Phir bhi dil ke armaan angez the
title: Burning Desires

text: He caught the thief. The thief was him from 20 years ago. The note said 'I'm sorry'
title: Time Thief

text: Koi kahaan se aaye, koi kahaan jaye. Bass raaste ka ilaam milta hai
title: Crossroads

text: The experiment worked. They had created the perfect human. Now they had to destroy it before it created more
title: Perfect Human

text: Aansu jab bhi girenge, zameen ko ek aur waqt yaad aata hai
title: Tears of Memory

text: The last message was 'Don't look back'. She looked back anyway. Everything changed after that
title: The Last Message

text: Dil ki baat dil mein hi reh gayi. Ab toh labzon pe bhi aata nahi
title: Silent Heart

text: The key didn't open any door. It was the question to the lock he never knew existed
title: The Wrong Key

text: Wo ladka aag mein bhiga, pani mein bacha, hawa mein uds gaya. Ab kahi nahi milta
title: Lost Boy

text: The doctor delivered the news with a smile. 'It's good news', he said. The patient started to cry
title: Good News Bad News

text: Sapne wo nahi jo sote waqt aaye. Sapne wo hain jo sone na de
title: Dreams That Wake

text: He survived the fall. The landing was the hardest part. Not of the body. But of the dreams
title: The Fall

text: Chai pee kar sab theek ho jaata hai. Lekin joh chai nahi peeta, uska kya?
title: Tea for Two

text: The phone rang three times. Each time a different person answered. Each time it was the same voice
title: Three Calls

text: Tanha raat mein sabse qareeb wo hota hai jo door ho
title: Closest When Far

text: She inherited the house. Inside was a room that wasn't there before. The key was under the pillow
title: The Hidden Room

text: Awaaz mein rona aaya, toh sabne kaha wo brave hai. Jab haqeeqat suni, sab so gaye
title: Brave Face

text: The fire started in the kitchen. By the time they realised, it had consumed the whole memory
title: Kitchen Fire

text: Door jaake paas hoi. Bhool jaake yaad aayi. Yeh zindagi ki daayareeti hai
title: Circle of Life

text: The letter was never opened. 10 years later, the seal was still intact. Some truths are better unknown
title: Sealed Letter

text: Wo waqt theek nahi ho sakta jab pyaar dushmani mein badal jaye
title: Love to Hate

text: He won the game. She lost the bet. The bet was that whoever wins must say the truth. Neither did
title: The Truth Bet

text: Raaste kaunsa bhi ho, seedha jana chahiye. Kyunki ulta waqt bhi milta hai
title: Right Path

text: The silence was louder than any scream. That's when he knew it was finally over
title: The Loudest Silence

text: Darr wo nahi jo aankhon mein dikhta hai. Darr wo hai jo dil mein chhupa hai
title: Hidden Fear

text: She counted the days. 365 days without him. The 366th was when he came back. But he didn't remember her
title: Amnesia
